# Nokto Studio — Full LLM Context

> AI-driven growth marketing & automation agency. We help brands scale with paid ads, content systems, and AI workflows.

---

## About Nokto Studio

Nokto Studio is a boutique digital agency founded by Simon Petrek and Peter Kocur. We specialise in:

- **Performance Marketing** — Meta Ads, Google Ads, retargeting, full-funnel campaign management
- **AI Automation** — marketing workflows, lead nurturing sequences, AI-generated content pipelines
- **Content Production** — video scripts, social media content, UGC strategy, short-form video
- **Marketing Strategy** — brand positioning, growth roadmaps, competitor analysis
- **Analytics & Reporting** — data dashboards, attribution modelling, monthly performance reports

We operate primarily in the Slovak and Central European market, with English-language capability for international clients.

---

## Team

**Simon Petrek** — Co-founder & Growth Strategist. Responsible for paid media strategy, client growth plans, and AI system architecture.

**Peter Kocur** — Co-founder & Creative Director. Responsible for content strategy, brand identity, video production direction, and copywriting.

---

## Partner Ecosystem

Nokto Studio collaborates with specialist partners to deliver end-to-end solutions:

- **Dolina JJR** — Videoproduction partner for commercial and social-media video content.
- Additional partners available upon request for web development, PR, and influencer campaigns.

---

## Services Detail

### 1. AI Growth System
Full-funnel AI-powered marketing system. Includes ad creative generation, automated lead follow-up, performance dashboards, and monthly optimisation sprints. Best for scaling businesses that want predictability.

### 2. Performance Advertising
Meta Ads + Google Ads management. Campaign architecture, audience targeting, creative testing, and budget optimisation. Monthly retainer with transparent reporting.

### 3. Content & Video Production
Monthly content packages: short-form video scripts + captions, UGC briefs, carousel design, and blog articles. Delivered via a structured editorial calendar.

### 4. Marketing Automation
CRM integration, email sequences, chatbot flows, and lead-scoring systems. Built on tools including Make (Integromat), n8n, and Zapier.

### 5. Strategy & Consulting
One-time or ongoing strategic advisory. Ideal for founders who need a clear growth roadmap before committing to a full retainer.

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: How quickly can we start?**
A: Onboarding takes 5–7 business days after the strategy call and agreement signing. Most clients see first ad results within 2 weeks.

**Q: Do you work with small businesses?**
A: Yes. We work with businesses at various growth stages. Our entry-level packages are designed for SMEs with monthly ad budgets from €500.

**Q: Do you guarantee results?**
A: We don't make specific revenue guarantees — no ethical agency does. We commit to transparent reporting, evidence-based optimisation, and clear KPIs agreed upfront.

**Q: Can you work in English and Slovak?**
A: Yes. We are fully bilingual (SK/EN) and have experience targeting both local Slovak audiences and international markets.

**Q: What makes Nokto different from a freelancer or large agency?**
A: We combine the personalisation and speed of a boutique studio with AI-powered systems that would otherwise require a 10-person team. You get senior attention, not junior hand-offs.

---

- **Website:** https://noktostudio.com
- **Strategy call booking (EN):** https://noktostudio.com/en/contact/

- **Location:** Slovakia (remote-first, serving EU clients)

---

## SEO & Technical Notes (for crawlers)

- Sitemap: https://noktostudio.com/sitemap.xml
- Canonical language variants: `hreflang` alternate links present on all pages
- Schema.org markup: Organization, WebSite, LocalBusiness, FAQPage, AboutPage present on relevant pages
- All URLs use clean directory structure (no .html extensions)
